ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "politicians" (
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each politician */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the politician is from */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the politician */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the politician */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the politician */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the politician */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the politician's term */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the politician's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("politician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politicians_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the party is from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "politician_party_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the politician */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politician_party_affiliations_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politician_party_affiliations_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment entry */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician the sentiment belongs to */,
  "perceived_sentiment" REAL /* Perceived sentiment towards the politician */,
  "true_sentiment" REAL /* True sentiment towards the politician */,
  "shift" REAL /* Shift in sentiment */,
  "stretch" REAL /* Stretch of sentiment */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the shift occurred */,
  "mp_num" INTEGER /* Number of MPs in the country */,
  "shift_country" REAL /* Shift in sentiment towards the country */,
  "stretch_country" REAL /* Stretch of sentiment towards the country */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the shift */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_shifts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Region where the country is located
